name: ecosystem-tooling
description: Aztec ecosystem packages — bun monorepo continuing Wonderland's aztec-standards, aztec-fee-payment and aztec-benchmark
author: Alejo Amiras

scripts.bench: bun run --cwd packages/aztec-standards bench && bun run --cwd packages/aztec-fee-payment benchmark
scripts.test: bun run test:nr && bun run test:js
scripts.test:js: bun run --cwd packages/aztec-standards test:js && bun run --cwd packages/aztec-fee-payment test:js
scripts.test:nr: bun run --cwd packages/aztec-standards test:nr && bun run --cwd packages/aztec-fee-payment test:nr
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/aztec-standards typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/aztec-fee-payment typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/aztec-benchmark typecheck
